author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for replacing the (String, bool) tool return convention across all src/tools/ files with Result<ToolOutput, ToolError> where ToolOutput is an enum (Text/Image/Structured/Marker) and ToolError categorizes failures (InvalidArg/PermissionDenied/NotFound/Io/Timeout/Upstream/Policy), deleting check_tool_result_marker and the in-band marker parsing entirely. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: pervasive across every tool, tool_intercept.rs format_tool_results_xml_with_names, the marker plumbing (USER_QUESTION_MARKER, ENTER_PLAN_MODE_MARKER, ExitPlanMode), and the completion-hint heuristics. This is the type-system foundation refactor that #222 also referenced. Owner-level multi-day work; would benefit from a design doc before implementation. Closing the cleanup-pass ticket while tracking the broader refactor under tools/ architectural work.
